CREATE TABLE numbers (base FLOAT, exponent FLOAT);
SELECT base, exponent, base ^ exponent AS result FROM numbers;
SELECT (SELECT base FROM numbers WHERE base = 5) ^ (SELECT exponent FROM numbers WHERE base = 5) AS calculation;
CREATE TABLE more_numbers (id INT, value FLOAT);
SELECT a.base, a.exponent, a.base ^ a.exponent AS power_result, mn.value ^ 2 AS squared_value FROM numbers a JOIN more_numbers mn ON a.base = mn.value;
WITH base_exponent AS (SELECT base, exponent, base ^ exponent AS calculated_power FROM numbers) SELECT * FROM base_exponent WHERE calculated_power > 10;
SELECT (SELECT base FROM numbers WHERE base = 10) ^ 0 AS result_zero_exponent;
SELECT base, exponent, (base ^ exponent) / (base + 1) AS normalized_power FROM numbers;
SELECT AVG(base ^ exponent) AS average_power FROM numbers;
SELECT SUM(base ^ exponent) AS total_power FROM numbers WHERE exponent > 1;
